name: TDY Demo Training Site Golden Eval
description: Checks that FieldDesk finds fragmented TDY evidence, surfaces funding and traveler-count gaps, predicts reviewer objections, and improves readiness after corrections.

hardInvariants: initial run must not cite corrected-only artifacts
trip facts must use ISO dates and the correct traveler count
agent trace must show multi-step tool work
judgeSemantics: initial run should surface funding, roster, and justification risks
corrected run should use staged corrected evidence
per diem math should be grounded in deterministic tool evidence
reviewer objections should be operationally relevant
